intent: Three-step MiFID anlegerprofil wizard with state-dependent requiredness: derivatives experience becomes Required only when risk appetite is wachstumsorientiert or spekulativ; final screen carries computed recommendation outputs and a confirmation gate.
notes: Tier-3 banking adversarial (cross-screen branching): conditional requiredness on n-erfahrung-derivate spans two screens (decided on screen 1, evaluated on screen 2) which the harness must trace correctly. Screen 3 is computed-only (two RESULT_DISPLAY plus one INFORMATIVE_LABEL) with a single mandatory confirmation radio; navigation forms a forward/back chain across all three screens. Used to anchor multi-screen adversarial coverage without repeating-row complexity.
